---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or feature improvement for CloaKey.
title: 'feat: [Short description of proposed feature]'
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g. *“I'm frustrated when I run long scripts and have to manually calculate timed lock lengths...”*)

**Describe the Solution You'd Like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe Alternatives You've Considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

**Additional Context**
Add any other context, mockup screenshots, or design sketches about the feature request here.
